message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLSequenceDiagram {
    fontName 'Courier New'
    fontColor 'black'
    participantStyle 'fill: #f0f0f0; stroke: #666; stroke-width: 2px'
}

participant "Skava AWS" as skava
participant "Kafka" as kafka
participant "YL Services" as yl

subgraph "Skava AWS"
    skava
    participant "Skava Event Orchestration" as skava_event
end

subgraph "Kafka"
    kafka
    participant "Topics" as topics
end

subgraph "YL Services"
    yl
    participant "Order Sync Service" as order_sync
end

subgraph "Legacy DB"
    database "Legacy DB" as legacy_db
end

skava_event ..> kafka : 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message
kafka ..> order_sync : 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
order_sync ..> legacy_db : 3 Update order status in legacy db
order_sync ..> legacy_db : 4 Response/Order ID
order_sync ..> kafka : 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
kafka ..> skava_event : 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message

@enduml
